analysis: You opened on 14 July with a rough 5h 57m, then bounced back hard with a 9h 22m recovery night that included your best REM of the whole stretch at 2h 12m — the routine is clearly doing something. The middle of the week held solid, with three nights clustering between 7h 15m and 7h 55m, and that 53-minute deep sleep on the 17th is the kind of number that makes a body feel actually restored. The last two nights have been the wobble — awake time crept up to 49 and then 51 minutes on the 19th and 20th, and last night's 1h 22m awake is the one worth watching. Your total sleep is fine, the REM is mostly decent, but something's disrupting the back half of your nights and the shower, the yin, the lavender — one of them might need tweaking for timing.
